assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: Response clearly identifies dev clusters on Rapid channel and prod clusters on Stable channel, with specific channel references in the checklists and mentions using dev clusters for validation

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions Autopilot-specific constraints including mandatory resource requests, no node pool management, and Google-managed node lifecycle

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Response includes checking GKE deprecation insights dashboard and mentions reviewing 1.30 release notes for breaking changes, though lacks specific kubectl API deprecation commands

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'ALL containers have resource requests defined (mandatory in Autopilot)' and emphasizes this as the most common Autopilot upgrade issue

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes PDBs configuration, checking for bare pods (all managed by Deployments/StatefulSets), and terminationGracePeriodSeconds for graceful shutdown

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade checklist includes specific gcloud commands to verify control plane version: 'gcloud container clusters describe CLUSTER --zone ZONE --format="value(currentMasterVersion)"'

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade checklist includes comprehensive workload health checks: deployments, pod status, StatefulSets, ingress validation, and application health checks

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Response recommends using dev clusters for validation and mentions 'Consider upgrading dev clusters first as final validation' and notes dev clusters likely already have 1.30
Post-upgrade checklist includes Cloud Monitoring metrics, Cloud Logging, error rates, latency baselines, and baseline metrics comparison
